Imagine being sixteen years old and locking yourself in a bathroom to cry. Jin worked at her father's restaurant every summer. Her father expected her to take over the business one day. But Jin wanted something different. She wanted to help people. She wanted a career with purpose. Her parents wanted her to be a doctor or lawyer. They wanted her to choose a safe path. But Jin had other dreams. This is Jin's story. It is about choosing your own path. About honoring your parents' sacrifices while following your heart. About discovering that maybe choosing your own dreams is the ultimate expression of gratitude.
